name: active_student_users_in_subscription_yr__c
label: Active Student Users in Subscription Yr

name: ai_initial_fee
label: AI Initial Fee
description: One-time initial AI usage fee charged at signing.

name: amount
label: Amount
description: The total amount of the deal

name: amount_in_home_currency
label: Amount in company currency
description: The amount of the deal, using the exchange rate, in your company's currency
calculationFormula: if is_present(hs_exchange_rate) then (amount * hs_exchange_rate) else amount

name: annual_total_revenue
label: Annual total revenue
calculationFormula: unit_price__c * quantity__c + if is_present(options_price__c) then options_price__c else 0

name: arr
label: ARR
description:
Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) is a core financial metric used by SaaS companies to measure the predictable and recurring revenue generated from subscriptions over a one-year period. 

It excludes one-time payments such as setup fees, training fees, or professional services.

This field is automatically calculated based on license fees x number of license. It does not take into account any one-time fees such as setup fees.

Note:
1. We are not yet taking into account AI credit fees as it is not a predictable annual recurring charge at this time.

2. ARR = the annualized value of active recurring subscription contracts.
It is contract-based, not revenue-recognition-based. This means ARR should not be based on deferred revenue, which is used in accounting and tax purposes.

name: closed_lost_reason
label: Closed Lost Reason
description: Reason why this deal was lost

name: closed_won_reason

description: Reason why this deal was won

name: closedate

label: Contract year (current/total)

description: The date the deal was created. This property is set automatically by HubSpot.

description: The stage of the deal. Deal stages allow you to categorize and track the progress of the deals that you are working on.

label: Source of last booking in meetings tool
description: This UTM parameter shows which site (e.g. Twitter) referred an associated contact to the meetings tool for their most recent booking. This property is only populated when you add tracking parameters to your meeting link.

name: fiscal_year
label: Fiscal Year - By license start date
description: Digication's fiscal year starts on 7/1 and ends on 6/30

name: fiscal_year_by_invoice_date
label: Fiscal Year - By invoice due date
description: Digication's fiscal year starts on 7/1 and ends on 6/30

name: fiscal_year_by_payment_date
label: Fiscal Year - By payment received date
description: Digication's fiscal year starts on 7/1 and ends on 6/30

name: hs_actual_duration
label: Actual duration
description: Calculates the time between the create date and close date. If the create date occurs after the close date, the value returned is 0.
calculationFormula: if createdate > closedate then 0 else time_between(createdate, closedate)

label: All team IDs
description: The team IDs of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_arr
label: Annual recurring revenue

name: hs_attributed_team_ids
label: Attributed reporting team
description: The set of teams that this deal is attributed to. If an owner is specified at the time of creation, the record will default to the owner's primary team.

name: hs_average_call_duration
label: Average call duration
description: The average call duration of calls associated to the deal

label: Average Deal Owner Duration In Current Stage

name: hs_campaign
label: HubSpot Campaign
description: The marketing campaign the deal is associated with

name: hs_closed_amount
label: Closed Deal Amount
description: Returns the amount if the deal is closed. Else, returns 0.
calculationFormula: if (is_present(pipeline_probability(string(dealstage))) and pipeline_probability(string(dealstage)) >= 1) then amount else 0

name: hs_closed_amount_in_home_currency
label: Closed deal amount in home currency
description: The amount in home currency that was closed for deals that were won.
calculationFormula: if (is_present(pipeline_probability(string(dealstage))) and pipeline_probability(string(dealstage)) >= 1) then amount_in_home_currency else 0

name: hs_closed_deal_close_date
label: Closed Deal Close Date
description: Close date populated only if this deal is closed and valid
calculationFormula: if (bool(hs_is_closed) and createdate < closedate) then time_between(closedate, 0) else 0

name: hs_closed_deal_create_date
label: Closed Deal Create Date
description: Create date populated only if this deal is closed
calculationFormula: if (bool(hs_is_closed) and createdate < closedate) then time_between(createdate, 0) else 0

name: hs_closed_won_count
label: Closed won count
description: This property is 1 if the deal is closed won, otherwise 0.

name: hs_closed_won_date
label: Closed Won Date (Internal)
description: Returns closedate if this deal is closed won

name: hs_created_by_user_id
label: Created by user ID
description: The user who created this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_createdate
label: HubSpot Create Date
description: The date the deal was created. This property is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_cross_account_note
label: Cross-account Note
description: Add cross-account note property to deal, allowing users to set a note when copying a deal in another account.

name: hs_cross_sell_opportunity
label: Cross-sell Opportunity
description: Identify a deal as a good candidate for cross-selling programs.

name: hs_days_to_close_raw
label: Days to close (without rounding)
description: The number of days the deal took to close, without rounding

name: hs_deal_amount_calculation_preference
label: Deal amount calculation preference
description: Specifies how deal amount should be calculated from line items

name: hs_deal_registration_mrr
label: HubSpot Shared Deal MRR
description: MRR of the quote purchased for this Shared Deal.

name: hs_deal_registration_mrr_currency_code
label: HubSpot Shared Deal MRR Currency Code

name: hs_deal_score
label: Deal Score

name: hs_deal_stage_probability
label: Deal probability
description: The probability a deal will close. This defaults to the deal stage probability setting.

name: hs_deal_stage_probability_shadow
label: Deal stage probability shadow
description: Fall back property for calculating the deal stage when no customer override exist.  Probability between 0 and 1 of deal stage. Defaults to 0 for unknown deal stages.

name: hs_exchange_rate
label: Exchange rate
description: This is the exchange rate used to convert the deal amount into your company currency.

name: hs_forecast_amount
label: Forecast amount
description: The custom forecasted deal value calculated by multiplying the forecast probability and deal amount in your company’s currency.
calculationFormula: if is_present(hs_forecast_probability) then (hs_forecast_probability * amount_in_home_currency) else amount_in_home_currency

name: hs_forecast_probability
label: Forecast probability
description: The custom percent probability a deal will close.

name: hs_form_id
label: Form ID
description: ID of the form that created the Deal object

name: hs_has_empty_conditional_stage_properties
label: Has Empty Conditional Stage Properties
description: True if the deal is missing conditional stage property values required to progress to the next deal stage.  This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the deal record.

name: hs_has_last_conversation_follow_ups
label: Has Last Conversation Follow Ups
description: Indicates if the most recent conversation has follow ups. True if hs_last_conversation_with_followups_object_coordinates has a value, false otherwise.

name: hs_has_last_meeting_followups
label: Has Last Meeting Follow Ups
description: Indicates if the most recent meeting has follow ups. True if hs_last_meeting_id_with_followups has a value, false otherwise.

name: hs_is_active_shared_deal
label: Is Active Shared Deal
description: Indicates if the current deal is an active shared deal. It is set automatically based on the value of hs_num_associated_active_deal_registrations.

name: hs_is_closed
label: Is Deal Closed?
description: True if the deal was won or lost.

name: hs_is_closed_count
label: Is Closed (numeric)
description: This property is 1 if the deal is closed ("Closed Won" or "Closed Lost"), otherwise 0

name: hs_is_closed_lost
label: Is closed lost
description: True if the deal is in the closed lost state, false otherwise
calculationFormula: if (is_present(hs_deal_stage_probability) and hs_deal_stage_probability <= 0) then true else false

name: hs_is_closed_won
label: Is Closed Won
description: True if the deal is in the closed won state, false otherwise
calculationFormula: if (is_present(pipeline_probability(string(dealstage))) and pipeline_probability(string(dealstage)) >= 1) then true else false

name: hs_is_deal_split
label: Deal Split Added
description: Indicates if the deal is split between multiple users.
calculationFormula: if (is_present(hs_num_associated_deal_splits) and hs_num_associated_deal_splits > 1) then true else false

name: hs_is_in_first_deal_stage
label: Is In First Deal Stage
description: True if the deal is in the first stage of its pipeline. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the deal record.

name: hs_is_open_count
label: Is Open (numeric)
description: This property is 1 if the deal is not closed won or closed lost, otherwise 0

name: hs_is_stalled
label: Is Stalled
description: True if Time in stage is 20% longer than the deal owner’s closed-won average time for that stage, false otherwise.

name: hs_is_stalled_after_timestamp
label: Is Stalled After Timestamp
description: Timestamp when Time in stage became 20% longer than the deal owner’s closed-won average for that stage.

label: Global Term Line Item Recurring Billing Start Date Enabled
description: For internal HubSpot Application use only. Indicates if the Global term for recurring billing start date for a line item is enabled.

name: hs_line_item_global_term_recurringbillingfrequency
label: Global Term Line Item Recurring Billing Frequency
description: For internal HubSpot Application use only. Global term for how frequently the product is billed.

name: hs_line_item_global_term_recurringbillingfrequency_enabled
label: Global Term Line Item Recurring Billing Frequency Enabled

name: hs_notes_next_activity_type
label: Next Activity Type
description: The type of the next upcoming activity for a deal. This property is set automatically by HubSpot based on user action. This includes logging a future call, sales email, or meeting using the Log feature, as well as creating a future task or scheduling a future meeting. This is updated automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_object_id
label: Record ID
description: The unique ID for this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_object_source
label: Record creation source
description: Raw internal PropertySource present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_1
label: Record source detail 1
description: First level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_2
label: Record source detail 2
description: Second level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_3
label: Record source detail 3
description: Third level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_id
label: Record creation source ID
description: Raw internal sourceId present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_label
label: Record source
description: How this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_user_id
label: Record creation source user ID
description: Raw internal userId present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_open_amount_in_home_currency
label: Open amount in home currency
description: The amount of the open deal, using the exchange rate, in your home currency
calculationFormula: if hs_is_open_count equals 1 then amount_in_home_currency else 0

name: hs_open_deal_create_date
label: Open deal create date
description: Create date populated only if this deal is open

name: hs_owning_teams
label: Owning Teams
description: The teams that are attributed to this record.

name: hs_partner_tech_win
label: Partner Tech Win
description: Tech Win field is used to identify where we are in achieving a technical win. Tech Win occurs when HubSpot technically fulfills the customer’s specific needs, marking a pivotal point in the sales process.Set to "In Progress" by Partner when joining the first disco call. Set to "Yes" by Partner when prospect verbally agrees that HS satisfies their technical/ business needs. Set to "No" by Partner when HS is not a fit based on customer feedback. How this property gets set: Manual Entry by Partner Consumer: SalesProperty Create Date: March 19, 2026

name: hs_pinned_engagement_id
label: Pinned Engagement ID
description: The object ID of the current pinned engagement. This will only be shown if there is already an association to the engagement.

name: hs_predicted_amount
label: The predicted deal amount
description: Returns the multiplication of the deal amount times the predicted likelihood of the deal to close by the close date.
calculationFormula: if (is_present(hs_likelihood_to_close) and hs_likelihood_to_close >= 0 and hs_likelihood_to_close <= 1 and is_present(amount)) then (hs_likelihood_to_close * amount) else ''

name: hs_predicted_amount_in_home_currency
label: The predicted deal amount in your company's currency
description: Returns the multiplication of the deal amount in your company's currency times the predicted likelihood of the deal to close by the close date.
calculationFormula: if (is_present(hs_likelihood_to_close) and hs_likelihood_to_close >= 0 and hs_likelihood_to_close <= 1 and is_present(amount_in_home_currency)) then (hs_likelihood_to_close * amount_in_home_currency) else ''

name: hs_primary_associated_company
label: Primary Associated Company
description: Object Id of the Primary Associated Company.

name: hs_primary_quote_data_updated_at
label: Primary quote data updated at
description: Timestamp of when the deal's amount, line items, and global terms were updated from a newly created primary quote association.

name: hs_priority
label: Priority
description: The priority level of the deal

name: hs_projected_amount
label: Weighted amount
description: Returns the multiplication of the amount times the probability of the deal closing.
calculationFormula: if (is_present(hs_deal_stage_probability) and hs_deal_stage_probability >= 0) then (hs_deal_stage_probability * amount) else 0

name: hs_projected_amount_in_home_currency
label: Weighted amount in company currency
description: The deal’s amount in home currency multiplied by its probability of closing, which is determined based on the deal’s stage and the probability that was assigned to it in deal pipeline settings.
calculationFormula: if (is_present(hs_deal_stage_probability) and hs_deal_stage_probability >= 0) then (hs_deal_stage_probability * amount_in_home_currency) else 0

name: hs_read_only
label: Read only object
description: Determines whether a record can be edited by a user.

name: hs_sales_email_last_replied
label: Recent Sales Email Replied Date
description: The last time a tracked sales email was replied to for this deal

name: hs_shared_team_ids
label: Shared teams
description: Additional teams whose users can access the Deal based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows or APIs.

name: hs_shared_user_ids
label: Shared users
description: Additional users that can access the Deal based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows and APIs.

name: hs_source_object_id
label: Source Object ID
description: The ID of the object from which the data was migrated. This is set automatically during portal data migration.

name: hs_submission_idempotent_id
label: Submission Idempotent ID
description: Submission Idempotent ID

name: hs_synced_deal_owner_name_and_email
label: HubSpot Sales Lead
description: The HubSpot sales lead that owns this Shared Deal.

name: hs_tag_ids
label: Deal Tags
description: List of tag ids applicable to a deal. This property is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_tcv
label: Total contract value
description: The total contract value (TCV) of this deal.

name: hs_unique_creation_key
label: Unique creation key
description: Unique property used for idempotent creates

name: hs_updated_by_user_id
label: Updated by user ID
description: The user who last updated this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_followers
label: User IDs of all notification followers
description: The user IDs of all users that have clicked follow within the object to opt-in to getting follow notifications

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_unfollowers
label: User IDs of all notification unfollowers

name: hs_v2_time_in_current_stage
label: Time in current stage
description: The time this object has spent in the current pipeline stage

name: hs_was_imported
label: Performed in an import
description: Object is part of an import

name: hs_weighted_pipeline_in_company_currency
label: Weighted open pipeline in company currency
description: Sum in company currency of open deal amount, weighted by pipeline stage

name: hubspot_owner_assigneddate
label: Owner assigned date
description: The most recent timestamp of when an owner was assigned to this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hubspot_owner_id
label: Deal owner
description: The owner of the deal

name: hubspot_team_id
label: HubSpot Team
description: The team of the owner of the deal.

name: notes_last_contacted
label: Last Contacted
description: The last time a call, sales email, or meeting was logged for this deal. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions.

name: notes_last_updated
label: Last Activity Date
description: The last time a note, call, email, meeting, or task was logged for a deal. This is set automatically by HubSpot based on user actions in the deal record.

name: notes_next_activity_date
label: Next Activity Date
description: The date of the next upcoming activity for a deal. This property is set automatically by HubSpot based on user action. This includes logging a future call, sales email, or meeting using the Log feature, as well as creating a future task or scheduling a future meeting. This is updated automatically by HubSpot.

name: num_associated_contacts
label: Number of Associated Contacts
description: The number of contacts associated with this deal. This property is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: num_contacted_notes
label: Number of times contacted
description: The number of times a call, email or meeting was logged for this deal

name: num_notes
label: Number of Sales Activities
description: The total number of sales activities (notes, calls, emails, meetings, or tasks) logged for a deal. This is updated automatically by HubSpot.

name: of_years_to_clone
label: # of Years to Clone
description: For example, if you want to clone this deal three times, select 3

name: pipeline
label: Pipeline
description: The pipeline the deal is in. This determines which stages are options for the deal.

name: recurring_revenue_amount
label: Recurring revenue amount
description: Amount of recurring revenue associated with this deal

name: recurring_revenue_deal_type
label: Recurring revenue deal type
description: Deal type for recurring revenue reporting

name: recurring_revenue_inactive_date
label: Recurring revenue inactive date
description: Date at which recurring revenue for this deal is no longer collected

name: recurring_revenue_inactive_reason
label: Recurring revenue inactive reason
description: Reason the recurring revenue for this ideal is no longer collected
